idea-plugin.name: Submodule Branch Switcher
idea-plugin.description:
One-click switch the main repo and all its submodules to a preset branch combination. Works across JetBrains IDEs that support Git projects and the IntelliJ Platform VCS APIs.

Core workflow:
  • Switch presets in one click - define a branch for the main repo and each submodule, then switch all at once
  • Preflight dry-run preview - table showing current to target branch, dirty file count, and branch source per repo before switching
  • Dirty working tree strategies - stash / skip / force: choose what happens when repos have uncommitted changes
  • Partial failure rollback - checkpoint before switching; one-click rollback on failure
  • Derive feature branches - create feature/xxx on all repos simultaneously from a preset baseline
  • Auto submodule init - missing submodules are auto-initialized after switching
Preset management:
  • One-click "snapshot from current state" to create a preset
  • Rename and import/export presets via clipboard
  • Undo last switch from history (last 5 switches)
  • Reorder presets with move up/down buttons
Quality:
  • Automated unit and integration tests, GitHub Actions CI (ubuntu/macOS/Windows), Qodana static analysis
  • i18n: English and Chinese via IntelliJ DynamicBundle
  • HiDPI-aware, theme-aware (dark/light) UI with IntelliJ native icons
Presets are stored in .idea/branch-presets.json so team members can share them via git.

Configure global options at File | Settings | Version Control | Submodule Branch Switcher.

Quick start: open the Submodule Branches tool window, click "From Current State" to snapshot your current branches into a preset, then switch with one click.
